text: A deep-sea submarine descends from the surface. A computer records its depth (in metres below sea level) every minute: 15, 26, 39, 54, ___. The differences between consecutive readings form a pattern. What is the next depth reading?
generatorSolution:
Step 1: Find the differences between consecutive depth readings.
26 − 15 = 11
39 − 26 = 13
54 − 39 = 15

Step 2: Notice the differences are increasing by 2 each time (11, 13, 15, ...). So the next difference should be 17.

Step 3: Add this difference to the last reading: 54 + 17 = 71.

The next depth reading is 71 metres below sea level.
